top_findings.summary: The skill describes using iMessage to handle 2FA/OTP codes during Amazon authentication, which implies accessing or reading personal messaging data. This is excessive for the primary purpose of browsing products, managing wishlists, and tracking orders, as 2FA can be handled manually or through less intrusive methods without requiring access to sensitive communication channels.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill describes using iMessage to handle 2FA/OTP codes during Amazon authentication, which implies accessing or reading personal messaging data. This is excessive for the primary purpose of browsing products, managing wishlists, and tracking orders, as 2FA can be handled manually or through less intrusive methods without requiring access to sensitive communication channels.
